mother! (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,800,004Details
International Box Office $26,716,995
Worldwide Box Office $44,516,999
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $59,410
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $373,078
Total $432,488
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A couple’s relationship is tested when uninvited guests arrive at their home, disrupting their tranquil existence.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,534,673 (42.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.36 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,368 opening theaters/2,368 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $23,733,340

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 15th, 2017 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: September 15th, 2017 (Wide), released as Mother! (Australia)
September 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Netherlands)
September 15th, 2017 (Wide) (France)
September 15th, 2017 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
September 15th, 2017 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: December 19th, 2017 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong disturbing violent content, some sexuality, nudity and language.
(Rating bulletin 2492 (Cert #51211), 9/6/2017)
Running Time: 108 minutes
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Film Actor
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Protozoa Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
